scripts.db:push: dotenvx run -f .env -- pnpm --filter @spectral/db exec prisma db push --config ./prisma.config.ts
scripts.dev:all: pnpm --filter @spectral/render-runtime-browser build:offline && dotenvx run -f .env -f apps/web/.env.local -- pnpm --parallel --filter @spectral/web --filter @spectral/render-worker dev
scripts.dev:worker: pnpm --filter @spectral/render-runtime-browser build:offline && dotenvx run -f .env -- pnpm --filter @spectral/render-worker dev
scripts.infra:down: dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.local.yml down
scripts.infra:ps: dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.local.yml ps
scripts.infra:up: dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.local.yml up -d
scripts.infra:worker:up: dotenvx run -f .env -- docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.local.yml -f infra/docker/compose.render-worker.local.yml up render-worker
scripts.setup:local: pnpm infra:up && pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push
